task_completion.description: Create the initial 60x60x40mm rectangular base block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 3D rectangular block is visible in the FreeCAD viewport, and/or a 'Pad', 'Cube', or 'Box' feature is visible in the model tree.

task_completion.description: Create a 90-degree V-groove on the top face.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A V-shaped cutout is visible on the top face of the 3D block, running completely across one axis. A corresponding 'Pocket' or 'Cut' feature should appear in the model tree.

task_completion.description: Create rectangular clamping slots on two opposite side faces.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Rectangular cutouts are visible on two opposite vertical faces of the block, running horizontally along the axis parallel to the V-groove.

task_completion.description: Apply correct geometric dimensions and constraints to the sketches.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sketcher view or property panels show specific dimensions matching the task: 60x60 base, 40 height, 90-degree angle for the V-groove, 12mm V-groove depth, 12mm slot height, or 4mm slot depth.

task_completion.description: Save the final model to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar displays 'v_block.FCStd' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/v_block.FCStd'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to construct the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with FreeCAD's graphical interface (toolbars, model tree, 3D viewport) rather than just running a terminal script to generate the file.

integrity.description: The model was built from scratch rather than imported.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD model tree shows a sequence of operations (e.g., Sketches, Pads, Pockets) indicating genuine construction, not a single imported solid body.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the CAD software by writing a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of text editors or terminal commands creating a fake 'v_block.FCStd' file without using FreeCAD.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The V-Block jig must have a bounding box of 60mm x 60mm x 40mm. The V-groove on the top face must have a 90-degree included angle and be 12mm deep (bottom vertex at Z=28mm). The two side clamping slots must be 12mm high and 4mm deep. The expected final volume of the part is 129,600 mm³ (±2% tolerance). The file must be saved exactly as '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/v_block.FCStd'.
